text:
What if a mermaid decided not to turn human again?

Well, she didn't really want to do it. For ages she lived in a cave. Every day she would go out and collect little bits of shiny things to put into her jewelry collection. Sometimes they were just glass fragments; sometimes there were tiny shells. On Mondays she wouldn't wear earrings.

Once she found a pearl necklace with so many pearls that you could hear it humming. That was her least favorite thing ever.

She decided she wanted something much different—one that didn't hum. One day she found a starfish made out of gold.
